data.title: Nigeria files $81.5B lawsuit against Binance exchange: Report

data.title: SEC Reverses Course, Dismisses Its Own Crypto Rulemaking Case Appeal
data.description:

data.title: SFC announces 12 new initiatives to boost the crypto industry in Hong Kong
data.description:
Today, the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) announced 12 initiatives to boost the security, innovation, and growth of the virtual assets (VA) market in Hong Kong through regulatory clarity. The new regulatory frameworks for VA over-the-counter and VA custodian services will be developed as VA product and service offerings expand.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/sfc-announces-12-new-initiatives-to-boost-the-crypto-industry-in-hong-kong/

data.title: German Central Bank President Calls for Introduction of CBDCs To Protect European Sovereignty
data.description:
The president of Germany’s monetary authority is advocating for a central bank digital currency (CBDC). In a question-and-answer session with economists at the Official Monetary and Financial Institutions Forum (OMFIF) think tank, the president of the Deutsche Bundesbank, Joachim Nagel, says he supports a CBDC. The OMFIF cites Nagel saying that “CBDCs will play a […]
The post German Central...
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/02/19/german-central-bank-president-calls-for-introduction-of-cbdcs-to-protect-european-sovereignty-report/
